name: RescueTime
description: RescueTime is commonly used to support founder performance workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use RescueTime when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in founder performance work.
founderWorkflow: Use RescueTime to keep founder performance work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding RescueTime before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
